title: IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Project Assistant Posts
description: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Project Assistant Jobs. Candidates who have qualified for the M.E/ M.Tech can grab this opportunity and apply for the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, and salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the address ...
